reason: Canonical workspace layout + create rules; new create-workspace endpoint and convert-only register mode must follow operation-isolation/idempotency/path rules
Backend owns layout; FE/Electron pass roots+relative paths. Governs registry, per-document actions, and write-boundary isolation (translate vs wiki)
New preload IPC for workspace list/create/rename/delete/reveal + userData path resolution must follow IPC security conventions
Create-workspace + register/build/translate jobs cross the Electron-sidecar boundary; follow the integration contract
New sources-list endpoint + register job + /ws/jobs event contract must match existing API/event conventions
Workspace state moves from single path to registry-backed; new queries (sources list) and job wiring follow FE state/api patterns
New-workspace dialog, switcher, and Documents list are added to the existing route/component structure
Where the new create-workspace endpoint + convert-only ingest mode should live in the backend package
Register = convert_source only; Build Wiki = agent.ingest on registered source — exact entry points for the decoupled import
Document list must move from wiki/papers/* to SourcesIndex with derived status; per-document action buttons live on the source row
